revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十四]][[zh:七月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 14|qq=July 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 5 of {{ill|Emperor Ingyō|ja|Emperor Ingyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ingyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}} , {{ill|416|en|416|qid=Q32402|lt=416|1=416}} ) – The oldest recorded {{ill|earthquake|ja|Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Japan is noted in the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} , describing an earthquake near {{ill|Asuka, Nara|ja|遠飛鳥宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka, Nara|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * Year 24 of {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}} , {{ill|805|en|805|qid=Q30389|lt=805|1=805}} ) – {{ill|Saichō|en|Saichō|qid=Q449943|lt=Saichō|1=Saichō}} returns to Japan from {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Yōwa|en|Yōwa|qid=Q729609|lt=Yōwa|1=Yōwa}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|1181|en|1181|qid=Q19704|lt=1181|1=1181}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} to Yōwa. * Year 2 of {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} , {{ill|1685|en|1685|qid=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} issues an early version of the {{ill|Edicts on Compassion for Living Things|ja|生類憐れみの令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edicts on Compassion for Living Things|1=Shōrui Awaremi no Rei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10855187}} , prohibiting the tying up of dogs and cats during the shogun’s travels. * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – The {{ill|Abolition of the han system|en|Abolition of the han system|qid=Q331905|lt=Haihan-chiken|1=Abolition of the han system}} decree is issued, formally abolishing the feudal domains.
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Toba|en|Emperor Go-Toba|qid=Q316658|lt=Emperor Go-Toba|1=Emperor Go-Toba}} , 82nd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (d. {{ill|1239|en|1239|qid=Q5434|lt=1239|1=1239}} )<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Go-Toba Go-Toba, Emperor of Japan], Encyclopædia Britannica.</ref> * Year 10 of {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} /Year 4 of {{ill|Tianqi Emperor|ja|天啓 (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianqi Emperor|1=Tianqi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q857085}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}} , {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} ) – {{ill|Koxinga|en|Koxinga|qid=Q197615|lt=Zheng Chenggong|1=Koxinga}} , also known as Koxinga, a key figure in the resistance movement to restore the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|qid=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}} (d. {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} , {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} ) – {{ill|Ogata Kōan|en|Ogata Kōan|qid=Q1187045|lt=Ogata Kōan|1=Ogata Kōan}} , {{ill|rangaku|ja|Rangaku Scholar|1=Rangaku scholar|2=ja|3=蘭学者|qid=Q11625245|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/rangaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625245}} (d. {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorinaga|en|Fujiwara no Yorinaga|qid=Q718947|lt=Fujiwara no Yorinaga|1=Fujiwara no Yorinaga}} , {{ill|kugyō|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kugyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138036}} and Minister of the Left (b. {{ill|1120|en|1120|qid=Q19542|lt=1120|1=1120}} ). * Year 8 of {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}} , {{ill|1197|en|1197|qid=Q19749|lt=1197|1=1197}} ) – {{ill|Ōhime (daughter of Minamoto no Yoritomo)|ja|大姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhime (daughter of Minamoto no Yoritomo)|1=Ōhime (daughter of Minamoto no Yoritomo)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11434216}} , eldest daughter of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} (b. c. {{ill|1178|en|1178|qid=Q19696|lt=1178|1=1178}} ). * Year 12 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 30|en|August 30|qid=Q2818|lt=August 30|1=August 30}} , {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} ) – {{ill|Hayashi Jussai|en|Hayashi Jussai|qid=Q3128825|lt=Hayashi Jussai|1=Hayashi Jussai}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. {{ill|1768|en|1768|qid=Q7675|lt=1768|1=1768}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – {{ill|Aizawa Seishisai|en|Aizawa Seishisai|qid=Q2090901|lt=Aizawa Seishisai|1=Aizawa Seishisai}} , a Confucian scholar of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (b. {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|13|7|15|6|14|8|7|0714|qq=}}
